title: Flower Paper Cut Artwork Greeting Card - Just Because Cards for Her - Birthday Cards for Women - Thinking of You Card for Female Friend - Colourful Butterfly Floral Pper Non 3D Art | Blank Inside
features: 🌿 THANK YOU CARD: This greeting card is perfect to gift a friend or family member and thank them. This thank you card could be sent as a goodbye card, Farewell card, or wedding guest thank you card.
✨ SPECIAL MILESTONES: Find the perfect greeting card for family and friends. We have designs for any occasion.

🌎 WE CARE: Our range of greeting cards are designed in house and all printed in England on FSC certified paper board. Our cards come with a high quality envelope that's made with sustainable materials to minimize environmental impact.

📐 SIZE & MEASUREMENTS: Our cards are 150x150mm, are printed on thick 280gsm card, and come with an envelope, sealed in a polybag. All cards are blank inside, leaving plenty of room for your personal and sentimental messages.

🎁 ABOUT OLD ENGLISH COMPANY: Hello, we're Old English Company. We're a UK based stationery and giftware brand. We design and create beautifully illustrated and hand-lettered products, with the aim to offer stylish, uncomplicated products with messages that resonate with people.
